Venue: DC9, Washington, DC, USA
YT Title: Why Don't We Duet? — benefit concert for the Potter's House Pay It Forward program. 18 local musicians paired by Tarot card (Dame Darcy's Mermaid Deck) into 9 duos, each writing and debuting a new song. $15 at the door, 7:30–11:30 PM. Talia was paired with Nina Goodman (keyboardist/singer, DC Music Review writer) — they both drew the Knight of Pentacles. They were the first duo announced on social media but not the first to perform. Their song was about the joy of being a dog — there was both joy and actual barking in it. Afterwards Talia was so disappointed in her voice (due to cancer treatments) that she asked me not to post the bootleg video I took. Hat autograph: Talia Segal (RIP).
